reviews.review_description: Very cool puzzle game. Starts off pretty easy but by the end became quite a head-scratcher. I got stuck in the last level at one point. Came back the next day and was able to solve it. Fun ending.

It's a short but brilliant VR hidden gem, the puzzles are great and the world you're exploring is even better. Little details are everywhere, leading to something bigger that I haven't managed to figure out or solve... Yet!

All around a great experience.

A beautiful and carefully crafted world of fun puzzles that ramp up nicely. Great showcase for the power of VR for understanding 3D space and being immersed inside these Escher levels. Movement is smooth and doesn’t waste your time. Comfort rating is moderate but it’s got teleport and snap turn so it was totally comfortable for me. You might feel some tingles if you have a fear of heights but you can’t fall and you can play as slow as you want.

Short but zero filler and worth your time. 

I have a feeling there’s some secrets hidden here.
